result.stdout:
Usage: blazor-shadcn <command> [options]

Commands:
  new <project-name>   Create a new Blazor app configured for blazor-shadcn
  init                 Configure the current Blazor project
  add <component>      Add a component into Components/UI (and JS assets into wwwroot/blazor-shadcn)
  list                 List available components
  doctor               Validate local prerequisites and project shape
  version              Show the current CLI version
  help [command]       Show general or command-specific help

Global options:
  -h, --help           Show help
  -v, --version        Show version

commands.payload:
Usage: blazor-shadcn <command> [options]

Commands:
  new <project-name>   Create a new Blazor app configured for blazor-shadcn
  init                 Configure the current Blazor project
  add <component>      Add a component into Components/UI (and JS assets into wwwroot/blazor-shadcn)
  list                 List available components
  doctor               Validate local prerequisites and project shape
  version              Show the current CLI version
  help [command]       Show general or command-specific help

Global options:
  -h, --help           Show help
  -v, --version        Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: blazor-shadcn add <component> [--force] [--dry-run]
Download a component into Components/UI and any required JS assets into wwwroot/blazor-shadcn.

commands.payload:
Usage: blazor-shadcn add <component> [--force] [--dry-run]
Download a component into Components/UI and any required JS assets into wwwroot/blazor-shadcn.

result.stdout:
Usage: blazor-shadcn doctor [--json]
Validate dotnet, npm, project detection, and remote availability.

commands.payload:
Usage: blazor-shadcn doctor [--json]

result.stdout:
Usage: blazor-shadcn init [--yes] [--remove-bootstrap] [--no-bootstrap-removal] [--skip-install] [--dry-run]
Configure the current Blazor project for blazor-shadcn.
--yes removes interactive prompting and accepts the default bootstrap cleanup action.

commands.payload:

Configure the current Blazor project for blazor-shadcn.
--yes removes interactive prompting and accepts the default bootstrap cleanup action.

result.stdout:
Usage: blazor-shadcn new <project-name> [--skip-install|--no-install] [--dry-run]
Create a new Blazor project, remove the template demo content, and configure Tailwind.
